monitor_the_situation.title: UN Chief Warns US-Israel War on Iran Pushes Region to Edge of Unimaginable
Israeli Forces Continue Attacks Across Southern Lebanon
— S3 · Conflict · Southern Lebanon · 43m ago. Israeli forces continue attacks across southern Lebanon despite the deployment of the Lebanese army, escalating tensions in the region.
— S3 · Economic · Bab el-Mandeb · 54m ago. Brent crude oil prices reach $100/barrel as conflict in Bab el-Mandeb escalates and Trump threatens Iranian energy infrastructure.
Yemen Strikes Sanaa Runway to Block Iranian Weapons Flight to Houthis
— S3 · Political · Sanaa, Yemen · 1h ago. Iran sent leaders from the Revolutionary Guard and missile-related equipment to the Houthis in Yemen, according to sources.
